sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: JMSB Stock Price and Chart — NASDAQ:JMSB
feed.summary: This page provides comprehensive information on John Marshall Bancorp, Inc. (JMSB) stock, including its current price, historical performance, key financial statistics, and analyst ratings. It details the company's financial health, upcoming earnings, and how various ETFs hold JMSB shares, offering investors a complete overview.

feed.title: Technical Analysis of HWH International Inc. (NASDAQ:HWH)
feed.summary: This article provides a technical analysis of HWH International Inc. (NASDAQ:HWH) based on various indicators including moving averages, oscillators, and pivots. It compiles these indicators into a summary gauge to suggest whether the stock is a buy, sell, or neutral. The analysis highlights that and the overall technical rating for HWH International Inc. is "sell," with oscillators showing a "neutral" rating and moving averages indicating a "strong sell."

feed.title: Keurig Dr Pepper taps JDE Peet’s CEO to lead coffee company
feed.summary: Keurig Dr Pepper has appointed Rafael Oliveira, CEO of JDE Peet's NV, to lead its combined coffee business, which is slated to become an independent entity from the soda maker. This decision follows earlier investor skepticism regarding the debt Keurig would undertake for the JDE Peet's acquisition. The company aims to split into separate beverage and coffee businesses by the end of the year.

feed.title: Aptiv PLC (APTV) Completes Spin-Off of Versigent Limited
feed.summary: Aptiv PLC (APTV) has completed the spin-off of its subsidiary, Versigent Limited, distributing one ordinary share of Versigent for every three Aptiv shares held by shareholders as of March 17, 2026. Versigent's shares are now trading on the NYSE under "VGNT," allowing both companies to focus on their core operations and potentially enhance shareholder value. Pro forma financial information related to the spin-off will be released in an amendment to Form 8-K.

feed.title: Jaguar Health Delays Annual Form 10-K Filing
feed.summary: Jaguar Health (JAGX) has announced a delay in filing its annual Form 10-K report for December 31, 2025, due to complex subsequent event disclosures. The company expects to file within 15 days, consistent with SEC regulations, and does not anticipate significant changes to its annual results. Analysts currently hold a Neutral view on JAGX stock, citing weak financial performance but acknowledging encouraging clinical progress.

feed.title: Assessing JD.com (NasdaqGS:JD) Valuation As Shares Trade Around Recent US$28.87 Level
feed.summary: Shares of JD.com (NasdaqGS:JD) are currently trading at US$28.87, showing mixed short-term and long-term returns. Simply Wall St's analysis suggests the stock is significantly undervalued with a fair value of $82.68, based on robust 2025 projections including strong revenue growth and improved net margins. However, this valuation depends on policy alignment and JD.com avoiding further share price declines, urging investors to consider both the potential rewards and identified risks before making investment decisions.

feed.title: Exelixis: A Strong Contender in the Cancer Drug Market
feed.summary: This article highlights Exelixis (NASDAQ: EXEL) as a strong contender in the cancer drug market, referencing insights from a Motley Fool Scoreboard episode. It encourages potential investors to consider the company's prospects, while also noting that Exelixis was not among the "10 best stocks to buy now" identified by The Motley Fool Stock Advisor analyst team. The article also touches upon the past success of Stock Advisor recommendations like Netflix and Nvidia.

feed.title: Investor Notice: Camping World ($CWH) Stock Dropped 24% After Inventory Management Issues Announced - Investors Reminded of May 11 Deadline
feed.summary: Bleichmar Fonti & Auld LLP has announced a class action lawsuit against Camping World Holdings, Inc. ($CWH) and its executives for alleged securities fraud. The lawsuit claims Camping World made misrepresentations about its inventory management and retail demand, leading to significant stock drops, including a 24.8% decrease in October 2025. Investors who purchased Camping World securities have until May 11, 2026, to seek appointment as lead plaintiff in the case.

feed.title: [8-K] GOLDEN ENTERTAINMENT, INC. Reports Material Event
feed.summary: Golden Entertainment, Inc. shareholders have approved the Master Transaction Agreement with Blake L. Sartini affiliates and VICI Properties Inc. at a special meeting on March 31, 2026. This approval clears the path for Golden Entertainment to go private, with closing anticipated in the second quarter of 2026, subject to regulatory approvals. Upon completion, the company's shares will be delisted from Nasdaq and deregistered, meaning public shareholders will no longer hold equity in the company.

feed.title: Short Interest in Castellum, Inc. (NYSEAMERICAN:CTM) Rises By 19.5%
feed.summary: Short interest in Castellum, Inc. (NYSEAMERICAN:CTM) increased by 19.5% to 4,596,457 shares as of March 13th, representing 6.9% of the company's float. The short-interest ratio for CTM is currently 6.4 days, based on an average daily volume of 715,251 shares. Despite low institutional ownership of 3.39%, several hedge funds like Jane Street Group, Quadrature Capital, and XTX Topco have recently increased or initiated positions in the company.

feed.title: Sjögren’s Syndrome Market Poised for Significant Expansion Through 2034, Driven by Advancing Pipeline Therapies and Rising Disease Burden | DelveInsight Analysis Featuring Astellas Pharma, Immunovant
feed.summary: The Sjögren’s syndrome market is projected for significant growth through 2034, driven by an expanding patient population, increased awareness, and a robust pipeline of emerging therapies. Key players like Astellas Pharma, Immunovant, Novartis AG, and Johnson & Johnson are advancing innovative treatments such as biologics and targeted therapies. The market, valued at approximately USD 1.9 billion in 2023 across the seven major markets, is expected to grow steadily, with the U.S. accounting for the largest share of diagnosed cases.

feed.title: Boqii (NYSE: BQ) CEO Hao Liang details multi-class share and option holdings
feed.summary: Boqii's CEO, Hao Liang, has filed an initial ownership report detailing his equity interests in the company. His holdings include 500,000 Class C ordinary shares, 51,964 Class B ordinary shares, 3,500 Class A ordinary shares, and stock options for an additional 196 Class A shares. The report also highlights the distinct voting rights and transferability conditions for each class of shares, with Class C shares carrying 100 votes but being nontransferable and nonconvertible, and Class B shares offering 20 votes and convertibility into Class A shares.

feed.title: Heartcore announces 1-for-20 reverse stock split
feed.summary: Heartcore Enterprises, Inc. has announced a 1-for-20 reverse stock split, effective April 1, 2026. The company, which is primarily engaged in software development for Customer Experience Management and Digital Transformation, also recently authorized a $2 million share repurchase program and provided earnings guidance for fiscal year 2025.

feed.title: Did You Lose Money Investing in Coty Inc.? Robbins LLP
feed.summary: Robbins LLP is urging investors who suffered significant losses in Coty Inc. (NYSE: COTY) to contact them regarding a class action lawsuit filed on behalf of shareholders. The lawsuit alleges that Coty misled investors about its financial performance and growth outlook between November 5, 2025, and February 4, 2026. Following disappointing Q2 2026 results and a downward revision of guidance, Coty's stock price declined by approximately 22%.

feed.title: John C. Malone (FWONK) writes OTC put options on 250,000 Liberty Formula One shares
feed.summary: John C. Malone, a 10% owner of Liberty Media Corp (FWONK), reported writing over-the-counter put options on 250,000 shares of Series A Liberty Formula One Common Stock. These European-style options have a strike price of $71.7531 per share and expire in March 2027. Malone received a premium of approximately $1.284 million for this transaction.

feed.title: Highway Holdings (NasdaqCM:HIHO) - Earnings & Revenue Performance
feed.summary: Highway Holdings (HIHO) has experienced significant declines in earnings and revenue, with earnings falling at an average annual rate of -37.1% and revenues declining by 13% per year. The company is currently unprofitable and has a negative Return on Equity. Recent updates indicate ongoing losses, although there have been acquisitions and dividend announcements amidst these financial challenges.

feed.title: Vulcan Materials Dispute: USMCA Investment Case Analysis
feed.summary: The Vulcan Materials Dispute, under the USMCA, highlights the clash between environmental sovereignty and foreign investor protections, with Vulcan seeking $1.5-1.9 billion for alleged indirect expropriation by Mexico. The case involves complex international arbitration, contrasting Mexico's environmental designations with Vulcan's property rights, while the U.S. Congress has introduced legislation to intervene. The outcome will set precedents for future North American trade and investment, underscoring the need for clear regulatory frameworks and compensation standards in the extractive industries.

feed.title: Mohawk Industries (MHK) CFO discloses ownership of 20,312 common shares
feed.summary: Mohawk Industries' CFO, Nicholas P. Manthey, has filed an initial ownership report (Form 3) disclosing his beneficial ownership of 20,312 shares of the company's common stock. This filing serves to formally state his existing equity stake as a key leader, rather than indicating a new purchase or sale of shares. The report provides transparency regarding Manthey's shareholdings in MHK.

feed.title: Sands China Art Push Highlights Las Vegas Sands Valuation Debate
feed.summary: Sands China participated in Art Central in Hong Kong, marking a strategic move to promote cultural tourism and attract higher-spending visitors beyond traditional gaming. This initiative by Las Vegas Sands' subsidiary highlights a broader effort to strengthen its brand and position its resorts for future demand. While LVS's stock performance has been mixed, this non-gaming strategy could influence investor perception and future cash generation, especially given its current valuation metrics.

feed.title: Pfizer’s RSV Shot to Be Offered to 3 Million More in England
feed.summary: England's National Health Service will expand access to Pfizer's RSV vaccine, Abrysvo, to include all adults aged 80 and above, making it available to an additional three million people. This decision follows new evidence from the UK Health Security Agency indicating that vaccination reduces the risk of RSV hospitalization by approximately 75%. The expanded program builds upon an existing initiative that covered individuals aged 75 to 79.

feed.title: KTTA SEC Filings - Pasithea Therapeutics Corp 10-K, 10-Q, 8-K Forms
feed.summary: This page provides a comprehensive resource for investors and traders to access Pasithea Therapeutics (KTTA) SEC filings, including annual, quarterly, and material event reports, alongside insider trading forms. Each filing is accompanied by an AI-generated summary, sentiment and impact scores, and end-of-day stock performance data. The platform aims to simplify access to critical regulatory disclosures with analytical insights and historical market reactions.

feed.title: JD.com Announces Pricing of CNY10 Billion CNY-denominated Senior Notes
feed.summary: JD.com, Inc. has announced the pricing of CNY10 billion aggregate principal amount of CNY-denominated senior unsecured notes, comprising CNY7.5 billion of 2.05% notes due 2031 and CNY2.5 billion of 2.75% notes due 2036. The company intends to use the net proceeds for general corporate purposes, including repaying existing indebtedness and paying interest. The notes are expected to be listed on The Stock Exchange of Hong Kong Limited.

feed.title: Invesco Mortgage Capital (IVR) Shares Drop as Market Rises: Insights for Investors
feed.summary: Invesco Mortgage Capital (IVR) shares dropped 1.11% in the latest session, contrasting with broader market gains, and have fallen 3.35% over the past month. Analysts expect a 14.06% decrease in EPS for the upcoming earnings report, though IVR currently holds a Zacks Rank of #2 (Buy) and trades at a potentially discounted Forward P/E ratio compared to its industry. Investors are advised to monitor analyst revisions and consider Zacks' recommendations for informed decisions.

feed.title: NEA funds disclose 4.9% Inventiva (IVA) ownership in Schedule 13D/A
feed.summary: New Enterprise Associates (NEA) affiliated funds have filed an amended Schedule 13D/A, disclosing beneficial ownership of 9,372,390 Inventiva S.A. ordinary shares, which represents 4.9% of the class. This amendment signifies that the reporting group has fallen below the 5% reporting threshold, not due to selling shares, but because of an increase in Inventiva's total outstanding shares. The filing clarifies that the position was acquired for investment purposes, with no transactions in the last 60 days, and disclaims beneficial ownership beyond what is held of record.

feed.title: XS332063910 Bond Analysis — Key Metrics
feed.summary: This article provides key metrics and an overview of the XS332063910 bond issued by Sumitomo Mitsui Financial Group, Inc. The bond has a fixed coupon rate of 3.96% and matures on April 2, 2034, with an issue date of April 2, 2026. It highlights the issuer's business activities, which include a range of financial services.

feed.title: Aspire Biopharma Submits Pre-IND Meeting Request and Briefing Package to U.S. FDA for Sublingual Aspirin Product for Treatment of Suspected Acute Myocardial Infarction (Heart Attack)
feed.summary: Aspire Biopharma has submitted a Pre-IND meeting request and briefing package to the U.S. FDA for its sublingual aspirin product designed to treat suspected acute myocardial infarction (AMI). This fast-acting, high-dose formulation has shown in clinical trials to inhibit platelet aggregation significantly faster than chewed aspirin, offering a potentially life-saving advantage. The company is pursuing a 505(b)(2) regulatory pathway, which could streamline the approval process by leveraging existing data on aspirin.

feed.title: 20/20 BioLabs (AIDX) grows 2025 revenue 17% and narrows annual net loss
feed.summary: 20/20 BioLabs (AIDX) reported a 17% increase in 2025 revenue to $2.0 million, with significant improvement in gross margin to 29.6% and a 33% reduction in net loss to $3.7 million. This financial improvement was driven by a shift to higher-margin revenue streams and decreased operating expenses. The company also secured a $5.0 million tranche under a potential $40 million preferred purchase agreement and highlighted future growth drivers like a state-funded firefighter cancer screening program and the launch of OneTest for Longevity.

feed.title: Saltchuk Welcomes Great Lakes Dredge & Dock to its Family of Companies
feed.summary: Saltchuk Resources, Inc. has acquired Great Lakes Dredge & Dock Corporation for $17.00 per share in cash, with an enterprise value of approximately $1.5 billion. Great Lakes will operate as a wholly owned subsidiary, maintaining its independent leadership and expanding Saltchuk's portfolio with dredging services. Both companies emphasize a shared commitment to safety, community service, and continued growth in their respective industries.

feed.title: Saltchuk Resources, Inc. and Great Lakes Dredge & Dock Corporation Announce Early Results of Debt Tender Offer and Related Consent Solicitation
feed.summary: Saltchuk Resources, Inc. and Great Lakes Dredge & Dock Corporation announced the early results of a cash tender offer for GLDD's 5.25% Senior Notes due 2029 and a related consent solicitation. The Offeror accepted for purchase all notes tendered prior to the early tender deadline and secured the necessary consents for amendments, following the recently consummated acquisition of Great Lakes by Saltchuk. The tender offer and consent solicitation are set to expire on April 15, 2026.

feed.title: iShares Gold Trust Announces New Leadership and CEO
feed.summary: iShares Gold Trust has appointed Jay Jacobs, BlackRock's U.S. Head of Equity ETFs, as the new President and CEO of iShares Delaware Trust Sponsor LLC, effective March 27, 2026. He replaces Shannon Ghia, whose departure was described as a planned transition not stemming from operational disagreements. This move aims to strengthen the Trust's leadership with extensive ETF expertise.

feed.title: Monolithic Power (NASDAQ: MPWR) EVP Saria Tseng sells 25,674 shares
feed.summary: Saria Tseng, EVP and General Counsel of Monolithic Power Systems (NASDAQ: MPWR), sold 25,674 shares of common stock on March 30, 2026, through open-market transactions. These sales were conducted under a pre-arranged Rule 10b5-1 trading plan and were executed at weighted-average prices ranging from approximately $998 to $1,042 per share. Following these transactions, Tseng directly holds 174,982 shares and indirectly holds an additional 1,000 shares.

feed.title: CME Group (NasdaqGS:CME) Stock Forecast & Analyst Predictions
feed.summary: CME Group is forecast to grow earnings by 3.7% and revenue by 4.8% annually, with EPS expected to increase by 3.9% per annum and future return on equity forecast at 15.9%. Despite these growth projections, the company's valuation is considered 21% overvalued after a recent price rise. Analyst consensus estimates and historical financial data, extending to 2015, are provided, along with a timeline of recent company developments and insider transactions.

feed.title: April is National Safe Digging Month – Contact 811 before digging to avoid striking underground utilities
feed.summary: CenterPoint Energy encourages everyone to observe April as National Safe Digging Month by contacting 811 before undertaking any digging projects. This free service helps prevent accidental strikes on underground utility lines, ensuring safety for individuals and their communities, and preventing service disruptions and costly repairs. In 2025, CenterPoint's natural gas infrastructure in Texas was damaged nearly 5,000 times, with many incidents occurring because 811 was not contacted.

feed.title: $1.85M Walmart, TeleCheck fees class action settlement
feed.summary: Walmart has agreed to a $1.85 million class action settlement regarding claims that its check processing disclosures failed to adequately inform customers about potential multiple bank fees for insufficient funds when using TeleCheck. The settlement does not provide monetary relief to individuals but requires Walmart to change check-processing disclosures at point-of-sale and on PIN pads in all its U.S. retail stores. The deadline to object to the settlement is April 23, 2026, with a final approval hearing set for May 13, 2026.

feed.title: Home BancShares acquires parent company of Mountain Commerce Bank
feed.summary: Home BancShares has completed its acquisition of Mountain Commerce Bank's parent company, leading to Mountain Commerce merging into Centennial Bank. This acquisition, which became official on April 1, expands Home BancShares' presence by adding eight branches in Tennessee. Customers of Mountain Commerce Bank can expect to see changes following this merger.

feed.title: The Under-the-Radar Nuclear Energy Stock That Could Supercharge Your Passive Income
feed.summary: Pinnacle West Capital Corp. (NYSE: PNW) is highlighted as an under-the-radar nuclear energy stock with significant potential for passive income. The company's subsidiary operates the highly productive Palo Verde nuclear plant, and it is actively pursuing license renewals and exploring new nuclear and solar energy projects. With a solid 3.69% dividend yield and consistent dividend growth, Pinnacle West offers an attractive investment opportunity in the expanding nuclear and semiconductor industries, particularly as it has avoided the recent share price surges seen by other nuclear companies.

feed.title: The Under-the-Radar Nuclear Energy Stock That Could Supercharge Your Passive Income
feed.summary: Pinnacle West Capital Corp. (NYSE: PNW) is highlighted as an under-the-radar nuclear energy stock with significant passive income potential, offering a 3.69% yield and five consecutive years of dividend growth. The company, through its subsidiary Arizona Public Service, operates the highly productive Palo Verde nuclear plant and is exploring expansion into small modular reactors and solar power. Its undervalued stock price compared to other nuclear companies and its presence in a growing state like Arizona make it an attractive long-term dividend play, especially with the expansion of the energy-intensive semiconductor industry in the region.

feed.title: Huize Holding (NASDAQ: HUIZ) amends Form 144/A on ADS option exercise
feed.summary: Huize Holding Limited (NASDAQ: HUIZ) has filed an amended Form 144/A, reporting proposed transactions involving American Depositary Shares (ADS). Each ADS represents 100 Class A common shares and is linked to option exercises under the company's share incentive plans. The filing, dated March 30, 2026, also specifies NASDAQ as the relevant exchange.

feed.title: Globalstar Rallies on Report That Amazon Is in Buyout Talks
feed.summary: Globalstar (GSAT) shares surged over 20% in late trading following a report that Amazon (AMZN) is in discussions to acquire the satellite provider. This potential deal aims to strengthen Amazon's own satellite operations. The companies are reportedly still negotiating the complex aspects of the transaction.

feed.title: Newmont Executive Files to Sell Small Block of Shares Under Trading Plan
feed.summary: Newmont officer Peter I. Toth plans to sell 3,000 vested shares on the NYSE, valued at approximately $339,000, under a Rule 10b5-1 trading plan. This transaction is considered a routine executive share disposal, following a similar sale in March, and represents a tiny fraction of Newmont's total outstanding shares. Analysts currently rate Newmont stock as a Buy with a A$215.00 price target.

feed.title: Public Storage Prices $500 Million Senior Notes Due 2035
feed.summary: Public Storage has successfully priced $500 million in senior notes that are due in 2035. This financial move was reported by Refinitiv and marks a significant event for the company.

feed.title: [Form 4] TYLER TECHNOLOGIES INC Insider Trading Activity
feed.summary: Tyler Technologies Chief Operating Officer Jeffrey David Puckett recently acquired 15.0332 shares of common stock at $291.023 per share through an employee stock purchase plan. This transaction increased his direct holdings to 7,768.5369 shares of Tyler Technologies (TYL) common stock. The insider activity is summarized as a single transaction valued at approximately $4K, with a neutral impact and sentiment.

feed.title: Tyler Technologies (TYL) CFO adds shares through 2004 employee stock plan
feed.summary: Tyler Technologies' Executive VP and CFO, Brian K. Miller, acquired 57.3618 shares of common stock on March 31, 2026, through the company's 2004 Employee Stock Purchase Plan at a price of $291.0230 per share. Following this transaction, Miller directly holds 25,395.0038 shares and indirectly holds 13,695.0000 shares through various family trusts. This transaction, categorized as neutral in impact and sentiment, reflects a routine, benefit-related share purchase for the CFO.

feed.title: APO Investors Have Opportunity to Lead Apollo Global Management, Inc. Securities Fraud Lawsuit Filed by The Rosen Law Firm
feed.summary: The Rosen Law Firm is reminding investors of Apollo Global Management, Inc. (NYSE: APO) who purchased securities between May 10, 2021, and February 21, 2026, about the May 1, 2026 lead plaintiff deadline for a securities class action lawsuit. The lawsuit alleges that Apollo Global made false and misleading statements regarding its business dealings and entanglement with Jeffrey Epstein, causing investors damages. Investors can join the class action to seek compensation without upfront fees.

feed.title: APO Investors Have Opportunity to Lead Apollo Global Management, Inc. Securities Fraud Lawsuit Filed by The Rosen Law Firm
feed.summary: The Rosen Law Firm reminds investors who purchased Apollo Global Management, Inc. (NYSE: APO) securities between May 10, 2021, and February 21, 2026, of a securities class action lawsuit. Investors have until May 1, 2026, to move the Court to be appointed as lead plaintiff. The lawsuit alleges that Apollo Global's leadership frequently communicated with Jeffrey Epstein about business, contrary to the company's claims, which led to reputational harm and damaged investors.

feed.title: Director at Fortinet (FTNT) gains 649 new common shares
feed.summary: Fortinet director Judith Sim reported the vesting of 649 restricted stock units (RSUs) into common shares on March 31, 2026, as part of her equity compensation plan. After this transaction, she directly holds 128,892 shares of Fortinet common stock. These RSUs were granted on August 20, 2025, and vest in scheduled installments through June 2026, contingent on her continued service.

feed.title: Director at Fortinet (NASDAQ: FTNT) receives shares through RSU vesting
feed.summary: Fortinet director, Kenneth A. Goldman, received 649 shares of common stock through the vesting of Restricted Stock Units (RSUs) on March 31, 2026. This transaction increased his direct holdings to 22,819 shares, with additional indirect interests through family trusts and partnerships. The report confirms no open-market purchases or sales, indicating this was routine equity compensation.

feed.title: Sempra EVP Bird sells $109k in company stock
feed.summary: Sempra Executive Vice President Justin Christopher Bird sold 1,128 shares of company stock for $109,066 on April 1, 2026, at $96.69 per share. This sale, conducted under a pre-arranged trading plan, occurred while Sempra's stock was trading near its 52-week high after a significant 40% gain over the past year. Following the transaction, Bird maintains direct and indirect ownership of over 26,000 Sempra shares.

feed.title: iShares ESG Advanced High Yield Corporate Bond ETF declares monthly distribution of $0.2383
feed.summary: The iShares ESG Advanced High Yield Corporate Bond ETF (HYXF) has announced a monthly distribution of $0.2383 per share for its shareholders. This declaration reflects the ETF's regular payout schedule, providing income to investors.

feed.title: Wells Fargo Maintains Lennox International(LII.US) With Hold Rating, Cuts Target Price to $480
feed.summary: Wells Fargo analyst Joe O'Dea has reiterated a Hold rating on Lennox International (LII.US) but significantly reduced the target price from $560 to $480. This adjustment comes from an analyst with a 59.3% success rate and a 10.4% average return over the past year, according to TipRanks data. The change in target price reflects a revised outlook for the company by the analyst.
